news.summary: The current consolidation phase of Bitcoin may come to an end once the price of BTC surpasses $107,000, breaking through the resistance levels and taking out liquidity on either side. This move has the potential to trigger a significant shift in the market dynamics.
news.headline: Bitcoin's consolidation may end when its price surpasses $107K resistance after taking out liquidity on both sides.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CPACharge, an online payment platform for accountants, has revealed a recent collaboration with SafeSend, a division of Thomson Reuters. This venture aims to streamline payment processes for tax and accounting firms, facilitating quicker transactions once clients receive their tax returns. Through this integration, firms now have the capability to seamlessly incorporate CPACharge into SafeSend One, the main product of SafeSend. This partnership is set to enhance efficiency and ease of payment collection for professionals in the accounting industry.
news.headline: CPACharge partners with SafeSend for accounting payment solutions, streamlining payments for tax firms.

news.summary: In Plainview, New York, Vertikal Risk Management Solutions (RMS) has introduced Hawk-I, an AI tool embedded in its primary COI tracking software, CertFocus. This advancement aims to revolutionize the verification and compliance tracking of Certificates of Insurance (COI). Hawk-I is designed to automate and enhance a process that has conventionally been prone to errors, streamlining it effectively. This innovative technology integration signifies a significant step forward for RMS, a prominent player in third-party risk management technology.
news.headline: Vertikal RMS introduces Hawk-I, AI tool for COI compliance tracking, enhancing CertFocus platform, automating manual processes.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The report also highlighted that the economy added over 250,000 jobs in the last month, indicating a positive trend in job creation. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 5% in response to the positive economic data. Analysts predict that this strong economic performance is likely to continue in the coming months, contributing to overall growth and stability in the country.
news.headline: Fury reveals financing of C$2.5 million.

news.summary: Dublin - The market for residential backup power has been estimated at USD 12.35 billion in 2024, with a projected increase to USD 17.57 billion by 2030, exhibiting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.89%. This sector encompasses a range of solutions aimed at securing continuous electricity provision in household environments in the event of grid failures or outages. The analysis and forecast report titled "Residential Backup Power Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, and Forecast, 2020-2030F" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.headline: Residential backup power market valued at $12.35B in 2024, expected to reach $17.57B by 2030 at 5.89% CAGR. High costs challenge growth.

news.summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) is set to hold a conference call on July 24, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review its second-quarter 2025 results, which will be published earlier that day. The company will also present an update on its operational activities during the call. To listen in, individuals can access the webcast on Valero's Investor Relations site at investorvalero.com. Valero Energy Corporation and its subsidiaries are known for their presence in the energy sector.
news.headline: Valero Energy to disclose Q2 2025 results on July 24, 2025; conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. Website for webcast: investorvalero.com.

news.summary: In Cincinnati on June 5, 2025, it was reported that a shocking 84% of sales representatives failed to meet their sales target last year, and almost 70% do not anticipate achieving it this year. These statistics from Salesforce highlight the inadequacy of conventional sales approaches. In response, Carew International is introducing its premier training program this June...
news.headline: Salesforce reports 84% of sales reps missed quota last year; 70% unlikely to hit it this year. Carew Int'l offers new approach.

news.summary: In Queens, New York on June 5, 2025, The LandTek Group, a TenCate Company, announced the completion of the initial mini-soccer pitch out of the planned 26 for the New York City Soccer Initiative (NYCSI) 26For26 project. A ribbon-cutting event marked the milestone, taking place at PS 211 Elm Tree.
news.headline: LandTek Group finishes 1st of 26 mini-soccer pitches in NYCFC initiative. Next phase: NYCSI 26For26. PS 211 Elm Tree site.

news.summary: In Houston on June 5, 2025, it was announced that NASA astronaut Jeanette Epps has officially retired as of May 30, culminating a distinguished career spanning almost 16 years with the agency. Epps notably contributed as a mission specialist during NASA's SpaceX Crew-8 mission, where she completed a total of 235 days in space, with 232 of those spent aboard the spacecraft.
news.headline: NASA astronaut Jeanette Epps retires after 16 years, including 235 days in space on SpaceX Crew-8 mission.

news.summary: Scope Technologies Corp, based in Vancouver, BC, announced a significant development in quantum computing that has accelerated encryption decryption timelines. The breakthrough, reported by NewScientist, marks a pivotal advancement in the field. The news commentary, released on June 5, 2025, highlighted the impact of this breakthrough on cybersecurity. This development is expected to revolutionize encryption methodologies and enhance data security measures.
news.headline: Quantum computing breakthrough accelerates encryption time collapse, sparking new investment boom. Scope Technologies Corp. updates.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.6%. The economy added 263,000 jobs last month, exceeding expectations and marking the 103rd consecutive month of job growth. The report also highlights a notable increase in average hourly earnings by 3.2% compared to the previous year. Overall, these numbers suggest a robust and thriving job market in the country.
news.headline: Trump and Xi discussed trade and tech issues amid strained ties. Visit Bloomberg.com for more information.

news.summary: The latest data reveals that over 20,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been reported in the past 24 hours. This brings the total number of confirmed cases to nearly 500,000. Additionally, the death toll has risen to over 10,000 with more than 500 fatalities recorded in the last day alone. These alarming figures highlight the continuing impact of the pandemic on the global population.
news.headline: Market faces pause as it anticipates US jobs report, halting stock advancement.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Rimini Street, Inc., a leading provider of enterprise software support services, has expanded its support for SAP ECC 6.0 and S/4HANA releases until 2040. The company, known for its third-party support for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, will offer full coverage without requiring clients to migrate to S/4HANA on RISE, as mandated by SAP. This move ensures continued assistance for customers who opt to stay on SAP's Annual Support program.
news.headline: Rimini Street extends support for SAP ECC 6.0 and S/4HANA releases until 2040, bypassing migration to S/4HANA on Rise.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, L.B. Foster Company (Nasdaq: FSTR) shared news of their upcoming presentation at the Three-Part Advisors’ East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference. John Kasel, President and CEO, along with Bill Thalman, EVP and CFO, are scheduled to speak at The Westin Times Square in New York, NY on June 12, 2025, starting at 2:45 PM ET. The presentation materials will be available on the Company’s Investor Relations website under “Presentations” on the day of the conference.
news.headline: L.B. Foster to present at East Coast IDEAS Investor Conference on June 12, 2025 in NY. Executives to present at 2:45 PM ET.
